title: Blackbeard Strikes Amazon Lily
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Green Bull, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Boa Hancock, Marines as Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.
scene: Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BLACK (HOLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: AGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: AYAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Slave Arrow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: AYAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ooh!! C

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Helmetpo- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Green Bull
dialogue.text: You too, Vice Admiral Yamakaji?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, Pacific[Fista] stop that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll smash the people who've been turned to stone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Stop Right Now!! That's an order!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Per- Fume...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Zehaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: snake princess!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Get your Fitty Hands Off of Me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Former Warlord 'Pirate Express' ISDA HANCOCK BOUNITY: $1.69 billion

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: She can't use her powers...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see they don't call you express for nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do I do?! Everyone's been turned to stone...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Most of the morons on my crew are petrified, you sure got us good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I've had my eye...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...on your power for quite a while!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FEH!! My beauty is what makes this power formidable!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you kill me, all your little friends will remain statues forever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoever inherts my power won't be able to release them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew it, Boa Hancock is far-trickier than anyone expected!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems like we're at a bit of an impasse, doesn't it, "hero!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You did me a favor at Rocky Port.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that made it possible for me to out Ochoku...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: and become the boss of pirate island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If I unhand the woman,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you reckon she'd play nice and change everyone back to normal?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be a headache for me if she didn't restore the marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll do it... if you two get off my island....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You know,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just don't buy it!! The way I see it, if I let go,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You'd just turn us to stone, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I honestly don't think any man can resist your charms.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a real head-scratcher... but I guess I gotta kill ya.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please wait!! Don't throw all those lives away!!

summary: This part advances the Amazon Lily / World Aftermath through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
